description: Synthetic repair corpus for ADR-0015 #8/8 (issue #551). Five known-bad edges exercising both bug-resolver and bug-extractor dispositions.
stub_selection_notes: save → bug-resolver: two entities share the name, resolver cannot pick one
get_all → bug-extractor: not in graph, Python plain name
submitProposal → bug-extractor: not in graph, JS PascalCase-initial-lower name
ProposalCard → bug-extractor: barrel re-export, not directly in graph
api_client → bug-extractor: runtime-injected dependency, not in graph
NOTE: template-literal and env-var stubs hit 'dynamic' disposition, NOT bug-extractor, and are therefore outside the repair scope. They are documented in the source files for completeness.

known_residuals.note: DRF ViewSet self.service.save() — two classes have save() methods. Reference: bind to ProposalService.save (bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb).
self.service.get_all() — not in graph. Reference: reclassify_as_external module=DraftService.
submitProposal() call from fetchProposal — not in graph. Reference: bind_to_entity bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb.
Barrel re-export — origin module lost. Reference: reclassify_as_external module=app/proposal-card.
Runtime-injected dependency — no graph entity. Reference: abandon.
